penalties.description: Minor deviations from marked line at several points around circumference, estimated average 1-2mm

technique_summary: Competent intermediate performance with steady cutting technique and good instrument control. Completion time of 94 seconds falls within intermediate range. Minor deviations from pattern line throughout circumference.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise adherence to marked line to reduce deviation penalties
Consider slower cutting speed to improve accuracy over the challenging curved sections
